Food & Non-alcoholic Beverages index The inflation rate, also known the annual inflation rate, the year-on-year as measures per- centage change in overall price levels from to the month in the previous one year same year. Accordingly, the inflation rate of the Food and Non-alcoholic component of the year-on-year CPI, for the month of March 2017 EFY stood at 11.9%.
